c0 := (2560) + (-101056)*t + (1765992)*t^2 + (-16840444)*t^3 + (100264192)*t^4 + (-420736398)*t^5 + (1333142436)*t^6 + (-3086268102)*t^7 + (4883484060)*t^8 + (-5063741610)*t^9 + (3273471300)*t^10 + (-1167481350)*t^11 + (163660500)*t^12:
c1 := (-256) + (17568)*t + (-477860)*t^2 + (6911982)*t^3 + (-60830696)*t^4 + (356242802)*t^5 + (-1468006634)*t^6 + (4328459738)*t^7 + (-8996005554)*t^8 + (12902480610)*t^9 + (-12440243850)*t^10 + (7644364800)*t^11 + (-2654787150)*t^12 + (381874500)*t^13:
c2 := (-320)*t + (17056)*t^2 + (-388780)*t^3 + (4989362)*t^4 + (-40808423)*t^5 + (228005708)*t^6 + (-899352886)*t^7 + (2516198434)*t^8 + (-4940985964)*t^9 + (6717008830)*t^10 + (-6168030702)*t^11 + (3626083860)*t^12 + (-1215488925)*t^13 + (172752750)*t^14:
c3 := (-64)*t^2 + (3144)*t^3 + (-65492)*t^4 + (781669)*t^5 + (-6058897)*t^6 + (32412544)*t^7 + (-122601572)*t^8 + (328644494)*t^9 + (-619449302)*t^10 + (810609884)*t^11 + (-717115648)*t^12 + (405939765)*t^13 + (-131285025)*t^14 + (18184500)*t^15:
L := c3*Dt^3 + c2*Dt^2 + c1*Dt + c0:
